title: senecillis intermedia
intro: Senecillis intermedia, also known as Groundsel or Butterweed, is a biennial or perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the dandelion family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been attributed to its sesquiterpene lactone content. The health benefits of Groundsel include its potential to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, while also being used as a diuretic to relieve urinary tract infections. Groundsel can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can be used in herbal remedies, making it a versatile and valuable plant in traditional medicine.
